mapper.select: SELECT common_id , common_code , default_describe FROM common_code WHERE common_code = '0B' ORDER BY common_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO modules (module_id, module_name, company_id) VALUES (#{moduleId}, #{moduleName}, #{companyId})

SELECT NVL(MAX(project_manage_id), 0) + 1 FROM project_manage_setting
INSERT INTO project_manage_setting (project_manage_id, company_id, type_id) VALUES (#{projectManageId}, #{companyId}, #{typeName})
